left_offer.title: Asus ROG STRIX B550-E GAMING AM4 ATX Motherboard
left_offer.description: ASUS ROG STRIX B550-E GAMING AM4 ATX Motherboard - Memory Support: 4x DIMM DDR4 Slots (128GB, 4400 MHz O.C) - Expansion Slots: 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 (x16 or dual x8), 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 (x4 Mode) & 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Storage Support: 2x M.2 Slot & 6x SATA 6Gb/s Connectors - Network: Intel® Wi-Fi 6 AX200, Bluetooth 5.1 & Intel® I225-V 2.5Gb Ethernet - ROG SupremeFX 7.1-Channel High Definition Audio CODEC S1220A - Rear USB Ports: 3x USB 3.2 Gen 2 (1x USB-C), 4x USB 2.0 & 1x USB 2.0

confuser_offers.title: Samsung T7 Portable SSD [2TB] (Indigo Blue)
confuser_offers.description: External storage, evolvedWhether you're carrying games, movies, or sensitive work files, the T7 Portable SSD gives you speed and security in a palm-sized package. Experience the next level of external storage.The new norm in external storageLightweight and pocket-sized, the Portable SSD T7 delivers fast speeds and is designed to safeguard data for an easy way to store and transfer large files. Experience everyday high performance in your work and play with the T7.Sleek and compact stylePocket-sized and slim, the lightweight body comes standard on the T7. Roughly the size of a credit card and weighing in at 58 grams, the solid aluminium unibody construction fits comfortably in the palm of your hand.Key FeaturesUp to 1,050 MB/s Transfer SpeedType C-C and Type C to A cables includedMulti-Device compatibilityPassword protection (optional)3 Years Warranty
